why_now: Codeberg adoption is still flat in the active measurement window.
Directory, curator, Apollo, and recent publisher-email lanes already have fresh actions inside live review windows.
Running the StackOverflow lane immediately would waste the current cooldown window; the script reported cooldown until 2026-05-24T11:24:37.256862+02:00.
A dedicated post-cooldown run creates a distinct high-intent demand-capture attempt instead of more same-family overlap.

verification.lane_probe_result: [SO Answer Lane] Active Stack Exchange cooldown until 2026-05-24T11:24:37.256862; preserving previous lane state instead of burning the quota window.

expected_outcome: A post-cooldown StackOverflow demand-capture attempt that either executes the live lane or delivers the strongest manual-ready answer packet with Codeberg as primary CTA.
replacement_condition: If the scheduled run still cannot execute a real StackOverflow action or meaningful manual follow-through, stop reusing this same answer packet and switch the next demand-capture slot to a different executable high-intent surface.
